prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约12832→16342→16578→15591→17831，整体呈后移趋势，近4年累计后移约5000名；2025年基准约17831名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年58人、2022年56人、2023年57人、2024年59人、2025年60人，2026年增至69人，较2025年扩招15%，扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学排名第83位，近年排名稳定在80–85区间；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上；2022年曾在陕西文科出现投档线骤降记录，但近年未见明显断档信号；风景园林学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；但A-及以上学科仅1个，整体学科厚度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，但北京林业大学以农林、环境、园林为特色，相关专业热度平稳；福建省2026年物理类考生估算约20.4万人，较2025年增加约7500人（+3.9%），竞争略有加剧；该校位于北京，对福建考生有一定地域吸引力；福建省内无同类农林类211高校，跨省报考竞争相对集中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17831名、2026年物理类扩招15%（69人）及福建省考生小幅增加；考虑声誉偏负面及考生增加对竞争的小幅推升，最终预测最低位次约19486名，区间18986–19986名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12832 → 16342 → 16578 → 15591 → 17831, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5000 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 17831; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 58 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 59 in 2024, 60 in 2025, and increased to 69 in 2026, a 15% expansion compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in 2026, it ranked 83rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 80–85 range in recent years; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; in 2022, there was a record of a sudden drop in admission cutoff in liberal arts in Shaanxi, but no significant cutoff drop signals have been seen in recent years; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, strongly attracting related majors; however, there is only one discipline rated A- or above, so overall disciplinary depth is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular, but Beijing Forestry University is characterized by forestry, environment, and landscape architecture, with stable popularity for related majors; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 204,000, an increase of about 7,500 (+3.9%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to Fujian examinees; there is no similar forestry and agriculture 211 university in Fujian Province, so cross-province application competition is relatively concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 17831, the 15% expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (69 students), and the slight increase in Fujian examinees; considering the negative reputation and the slight increase in competition due to the rise in examinees, the final predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19486, with a range of 18986–19986.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Urban and Rural Planning.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18986–19986, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 18986), you can focus on aiming for top majors such as Landscape Architecture Liangxi Experimental Class and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 19986), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors to ensure admission.
